name: Namedays Calendar
tagline: Look up namedays by date or name
description: Get today's namedays across countries, look up namedays for a specific day and month, and search which date a given name is celebrated on.

auth.hint: Namedays Calendar is a free, unauthenticated API; no credential is required.

tools.name: get_today_namedays
tools.description: Retrieve the namedays celebrated today across supported countries.

params.name: timezone
params.description: Optional PHP timezone identifier; defaults to UTC.

tools.name: get_namedays_by_date
tools.description: Retrieve the namedays celebrated on a specific day and month across supported countries.

tools.name: search_nameday_by_name
tools.description: Search all supported countries for the date a given name is celebrated.

params.name: name
params.description: Name to search for, from 2 through 15 characters.
